Detention-pay standards

BETA

Transparent petitions with goals, updates and verified support.

Module foundation ready

Public beta: some records and counts are demonstration data until live feeds and verified community submissions are connected.

PRIORITY PETITION

Require U.S.-Based ELD Data and Auditable Edits

Advocacy draft seeking stronger domestic data custody, transparent edit histories, verified support access and FMCSA-auditable ELD records. Claims about specific crashes require formal source review before public campaign publication.

DRIVER WAGE PETITION

Ban Nonrefundable Company-Driver Deposits

Advocacy draft opposing recurring paycheck deductions presented as deposits when drivers lack clear escrow, accounting and prompt-return protections.

CAMPAIGN GROUNDWORK

Parking, Broker Transparency and Wage Recovery

Additional campaign categories for truck parking expansion, unpaid wages, detention transparency and driver protections.

Drivers Lounge
Built by drivers, for drivers. Public beta.
